name: QA 1695
description:
PCP QA Test No. 1695

Valgrind pmproxy REST API test cases.

**To reproduce this test, please run:**

    build/ci/ci-run.py fedora-rawhide-container reproduce
descriptionHtml:

Valgrind pmproxy REST API test cases.

To reproduce this test, please run:

build/ci/ci-run.py fedora-rawhide-container reproduce
